title: HackerRank open sourced its ATS. My resume scored 90/100. Oh wait 74. No – 88
summary: HackerRank开源了其ATS系统，作者测试简历评分波动大，引发对AI招聘可靠性的讨论。
translated_summary: HackerRank open sourced its ATS system; the author tested resume scoring with fluctuating results, sparking discussion on AI hiring reliability.
